name: Feature request
about: Propose a new agent, slash command, or harness utility.
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement

## What you want
<!-- One sentence describing the new capability. -->

## Why
<!-- The problem it solves. Concrete example helps a lot. -->

## Where it fits

- [ ] new agent under `.claude/agents/`
- [ ] new slash command under `.claude/commands/`
- [ ] new utility under `harness/`
- [ ] knowledge skill extension under `skills/formal-math-ai/`
- [ ] benchmark addition
- [ ] something else

<!-- Pseudo-prompt, pseudo-code, or rough I/O. Doesn't have to be polished. -->

<!-- If yes, why isn't that enough? -->
